perturbed_task_language: Pick the tomato sauce and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: task-pert variant: target object is tomato sauce can; place in basket
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may pick the wrong red object (ketchup) or fail to deliver to basket
strategy_notes: Localized via two-camera back-projection. Agentview clustering (world_00.npy) found 7 raised clusters; the MILK carton has a red-topped label that initially confused the search. Found tomato_sauce by filtering red pixels (R>50, G<50, B<30) at z>0.04 and clustering — pinned at world (-0.18, -0.08), top_z=0.083, pixel (108,107). Wrist refinement (world_wrist_03.npy after move_to (-0.20,-0.08,0.25)) confirmed can at world (-0.198,-0.077,top_z=0.078). Distinguished from KETCHUP (back-left, world (-0.10,-0.24), taller bottle z=0.149) and ALPHABET SOUP (back-right blue can, world (-0.13,+0.06)). First pi0_pick (prompt 'pick up the tomato sauce') gripper-closed fully (qpos=0.0008) — grabbed air. Rung-2 prompt ('Pick the tomato sauce and place it in the basket') successfully picked AND carried near basket. Attempt 1 released at eef (0.046,0.248,0.185); can fell BESIDE basket at world (0.17,0.26) — x-shift +10cm. Reset. Attempt 2: prompt 'pick up the tomato sauce can', then carry over basket with x-offset compensation. Released at (0.045,0.251,0.185); can balanced on basket rim at world (0.09,0.25,top_z=0.16). Re-grasped can on rim with pi0_pick, then moved to basket interior center (0.04,0.27) and released at eef z=0.173. Predicate fired: libero_terminated=True.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: pick up the tomato sauce can
